prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `f9a67cb5`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package for `f9a67cb5`. The rule is: a single border `2` propagates inward until it hits an `8` barrier, fans along the adjacent lane between the nearest holes on that barrier, and continues inward only through real holes; this repeats until the path reaches the far edge. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as a starting hypothesis because it matched the official examples; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry, so no `notes.md` was needed. No new shared primitive was added.
